Our Story

Crafted for Those Who
Deserve More

Growthz was born from a simple frustration — existing hair fiber products that clumped, shone under light, and washed out by midday. We believed people deserved better.

Every Growthz fiber is engineered with natural keratin proteins that electrostatically bond to your existing hair — creating an undetectable, wind-proof, sweat-resistant result that lasts all day.

From thinning crowns to receding hairlines, Growthz gives you the confidence to step out — every single day.

Application

Effortless in
Four Steps

01
Style Your Hair

Start with dry, styled hair. Growthz works best on hair that has been combed or brushed into your desired style.

02
Shake & Apply

Hold the bottle 4–6 inches from your head. Gently shake fibers onto thinning areas for even, natural coverage.

03
Pat & Blend

Lightly pat the hair to bond fibers to your existing strands. Use a comb to blend for a completely natural look.

04
Lock & Go

Optionally apply Growthz Hair Fiber Spray for maximum hold. Your result is wind-proof, sweat-resistant and lasts until you wash.

FAQ

Questions? Answered.

Yes — Growthz fibers are made from natural keratin, the same protein your hair is made of. They electrostatically bond to existing strands and are completely undetectable even up close. No shine, no clumping, no artificial look.

Completely. Growthz washes out cleanly with your regular shampoo — no staining, no residue, no damage. It stays on until you wash it, then disappears without a trace.

Absolutely. Growthz is dermatologically tested and free from parabens, sulfates, and harsh chemicals. Thousands of customers use it every single day with no irritation or side effects.

No. Growthz is sweat-resistant and weather-resistant. It holds firm through gym sessions, rain, and humidity. Use the FiberLock Spray Kit for maximum all-day hold in the most active conditions.

We have 3 shades — Black, Dark Brown, and Medium Brown. Choose the shade closest to your natural hair color. If you're between shades, go one shade lighter for a more natural blend. Use our Shade Finder Quiz for a personalised recommendation.

Yes — Growthz works beautifully for women dealing with thinning hair, widening parts, or patchiness. It's one of our most popular uses. Simply apply to the thinning areas and blend with your fingers or a comb.
